speaker: speaker1
text: What are you listening to ? Is that Beethoven or Mozart ?

speaker: speaker2
text: It's Beethoven . Do you like it ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I think Beethoven's music is incredible . I've heard that listening to it can make you more intelligent , too . Do you believe that ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I don't know about that , but I do think that it helps people relax .

speaker: speaker1
text: What other kind of music do you listen to ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Actually , I mostly just listen classical music . What about you ?

speaker: speaker1
text: To be honest , I think classical music is too complicated for me .

speaker: speaker2
text: What kind of music do you prefer then ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I like pop music . Do you ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Not really . I don't think pop music has much depth .

speaker: speaker1
text: I see what you mean . I think that's way I like it so much .

speaker: speaker2
text: How long have you been in to pop music , then ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I've always been into it . Have you always liked classical music ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Not really . When I was little , we didn't really listen to music at all .

speaker: speaker1
text: So , how did you become interested in it ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Well , when I was about 10 years old , I started playing the piano . I think that's how it all started .

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes , it's one of my hobbies .
